basic_details.job_title: Chhattisgarh High Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 58 Staff Car Driver, Lift Man and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Chhattisgarh High Court, Bilaspur has released Advertisement No. 04/2026, dated 09 July 2026, inviting applications for 58 vacancies across three posts: Staff Car Driver (17 posts), Lift Man (7 posts), and Contingency Fund Employees (34 posts). Eligible Indian citizens can apply offline via Speed Post on or before 10 August 2026, 5:00 PM.

important_dates.application_start_date: Not mentioned in the official notification

application_fee.details: Not mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years (completed) Maximum Age: 30 years (for other candidates) Maximum Age for Chhattisgarh domicile candidates: 40 years | In no circumstance shall the maximum age limit exceed 45 years.

qualification.details: post: Qualification | staff car driver: Class 10th pass from a recognized board; valid Transport (Commercial) Driving License; experience driving all types of vehicles required. Skilled/experienced mechanics preferred. | lift man: Class 12th pass from a recognized board; trained in wiring/electrician work from a government-recognized ITI. Candidates with lift operation knowledge/experience certificates preferred. | contingency fund employee: Class 8th pass from a recognized board/school only. Candidates with qualification higher than 8th will not be considered.

vacancy_details.Pay Level: Daily wage fixed by Collector, Bilaspur

post_wise_breakdown.pay_level: Daily wage fixed by Collector, Bilaspur

salary_details.details: Staff Car Driver and Lift Man: Pay Level 4, Rs. 19,500 – 62,000 per month Contingency Fund Employee: Daily wage as fixed by the Collector, Bilaspur, from time to time

selection_process: Written Exam: 100 marks (Motor Vehicle Act-based questions); minimum 33% required to qualify Practical Exam: 100 marks; minimum 40 marks required to pass Bonus: 5 extra marks for candidates with a mechanic certificate from Polytechnic/ITI/authorized vehicle dealer Merit list prepared from practical exam marks plus applicable bonus marks; ties broken by date of birth (older candidate ranked higher)

lift operation and maintenance); minimum 33% required to qualify Practical Exam: 100 marks; minimum 40 marks required to pass Bonus: 10 extra marks for candidates with a lift operation knowledge/experience certificate Merit list prepared from written exam marks
Selection through a Skill Test relevant to the specific post Merit list prepared based on skill test marks

Admit cards will be uploaded on https://highcourt.cg.gov.in/. Candidates must carry a valid photo ID (Driving License/Voter ID/Aadhaar Card/Bank Passbook/PAN Card/Smart Card) to the exam. No separate call letter will be sent by post. No travel allowance will be paid for attending the exam.
how_to_apply: Download the application form for the relevant post (Staff Car Driver / Lift Man / Contingency Fund Employee) from https://highcourt.cg.gov.in/.
Fill the form completely by hand or by typing, and sign it.
Attach self-attested copies of all required educational, identity, category, and experience documents.
For Contingency Fund Employee posts, attach the notarized affidavit confirming 8th-pass qualification.
Place the completed application and documents in a sealed envelope.
Clearly write the post name applied for ("Staff Car Driver" / "Lift Man" / "Contingency Fund Employee"), Advertisement No. 04/2026, and the notification date on the left side of the envelope.
Address the envelope to: Registrar General, Chhattisgarh High Court, Bodri, Bilaspur (Chhattisgarh) – 495220
Send the application only via Speed Post so that it reaches the office on or before 10 August 2026, 5:00 PM. Applications sent through any other mode will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Quick Overview: CG High Court Recruitment 2026

rows.details: Staff Car Driver, Lift Man, Contingency Fund Employee

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Applications must reach the Registrar General's office by the last date via Speed Post only; applications received after the deadline will not be considered, regardless of postal delay.

rows.date: Not mentioned in the official notification

content_sections.heading: Chhattisgarh High Court Recruitment Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 58 posts are advertised across three categories. Of the total vacancies, 1 post is reserved for Persons with Disabilities (Acid Attack Victims, Leprosy Cured). Of the total vacancies, 1 post is reserved for Persons with Disabilities (OL, LV, HH, OH, Acid Attack, Dwarfism, Leprosy Cured). Of the total vacancies, 2 posts are reserved for Persons with Disabilities (OA, OL, LV, HH, OH except Chowkidar, Acid Attack Victim, Dwarfism, Leprosy Cured, Autism). This category covers work roles such as Sweeper, Cook, Gardener, Watchman, Electrician, Plumber, Driver, Pantry Staff, and Pump Attendant. Note: The number of vacancies is variable and may increase or decrease at any time. Recruitment is subject to the final decision of the Supreme Court in SLP (C) No. 19668/2022.

rows.pay_level: Daily wage fixed by Collector, Bilaspur

tables.caption: Staff Car Driver: Category-wise Vacancy (17 Posts)
Contingency Fund Employee: Category-wise Vacancy (34 Posts)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026)
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years (completed) Maximum Age: 30 years (for other candidates) Maximum Age for Chhattisgarh domicile candidates: 40 years In no circumstance shall the maximum age limit exceed 45 years .

rows.relaxation: As per Chhattisgarh GAD circular dated 27.09.2014

rows.qualification: Class 10th pass from a recognized board; valid Transport (Commercial) Driving License; experience driving all types of vehicles required. Skilled/experienced mechanics preferred.
Class 12th pass from a recognized board; trained in wiring/electrician work from a government-recognized ITI. Candidates with lift operation knowledge/experience certificates preferred.
Class 8th pass from a recognized board/school only. Candidates with qualification higher than 8th will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: Salary
content_sections.text: Staff Car Driver and Lift Man: Pay Level 4, Rs. 19,500 – 62,000 per month Contingency Fund Employee: Daily wage as fixed by the Collector, Bilaspur, from time to time

content_sections.heading: Exam Pattern & Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Exam: 100 marks (Motor Vehicle Act-based questions); minimum 33% required to qualify Practical Exam: 100 marks; minimum 40 marks required to pass Bonus: 5 extra marks for candidates with a mechanic certificate from Polytechnic/ITI/authorized vehicle dealer Merit list prepared from practical exam marks plus applicable bonus marks; ties broken by date of birth (older candidate ranked higher) Written Exam: 100 marks (wiring, electrician work, lift operation and maintenance); minimum 33% required to qualify Practical Exam: 100 marks; minimum 40 marks required to pass Bonus: 10 extra marks for candidates with a lift operation knowledge/experience certificate Merit list prepared from written exam marks, practical exam marks, and applicable bonus marks Selection through a Skill Test relevant to the specific post Merit list prepared based on skill test marks Admit cards will be uploaded on https://highcourt.cg.gov.in/ . Candidates must carry a valid photo ID (Driving License/Voter ID/Aadhaar Card/Bank Passbook/PAN Card/Smart Card) to the exam. No separate call letter will be sent by post. No travel allowance will be paid for attending the exam.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Reservation Policy
content_sections.text: Reserved posts for SC/ST/OBC and women are available only to candidates who are genuine local (domicile) residents of Chhattisgarh. Candidates from other states belonging to SC/ST/OBC in their home state will be considered only against unreserved posts. OBC candidates must not fall under the creamy layer. Women's reservation applies only to female candidates who are local residents of Chhattisgarh. If suitable women candidates are unavailable in any category, such posts will not be carried forward to the next year and will be filled by male candidates of the same category.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Duly signed and completely filled application form in the prescribed format Self-attested birth/age proof certificate Self-attested 8th/10th/12th class mark sheets and certificates (as applicable to the post) Valid Transport (Commercial) Driving License (for Staff Car Driver post) Government-recognized ITI wiring/electrician certificate (for Lift Man post) Caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC), self-attested, issued by competent authority (if applicable) Chhattisgarh domicile/local residence certificate (if applicable) Disability certificate, self-attested (if applicable) Experience certificate related to the applied post (if applicable) Notarized affidavit confirming educational qualification is 8th pass only (mandatory for Contingency Fund Employee posts, in the prescribed format attached with the notification)

content_sections.heading: Other Important Conditions
content_sections.text: Applicant must be an Indian citizen. Applicant must not have more than one living spouse. Applicant must be of good character and physically and mentally fit. Applicant must not have been dismissed or removed from service by any High Court, government, or statutory/local authority. Applicant must not have been convicted of moral turpitude or debarred by any High Court/Public Service Commission/Selection Board. Applicant must possess the required qualification as of the last date of application receipt. Candidates convicted of an offence against women are not eligible; cases pending under laws relating to offences against women/children (including POCSO) will keep the appointment pending until the case is finally decided. Applications received without signature, in a format different from the prescribed one, or without the required documents will not be considered, and no correspondence will be entertained in this regard. The recruiting authority reserves the right to reject any or all applications at any stage without assigning reasons, and to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage. Selected candidates (Staff Car Driver and Lift Man) will be appointed on a three-year probation period, extendable by one additional year if not successfully completed; service can be terminated without assigning reasons if probation is not completed successfully.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Chhattisgarh High Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 10 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM, via Speed Post only.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 58 posts are advertised: 17 Staff Car Driver, 7 Lift Man, and 34 Contingency Fund Employee posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for CG High Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application is offline. Completed forms must be sent by Speed Post to the Registrar General, Chhattisgarh High Court, Bodri, Bilaspur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Staff Car Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 10th from a recognized board and hold a valid Transport (Commercial) Driving License with experience driving all types of vehicles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification for the Lift Man post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 12th from a recognized board and be trained in wiring/electrician work from a government-recognized ITI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification for Contingency Fund Employee posts?
faq.answer: Only Class 8th pass is required. Candidates with a qualification higher than 8th class will not be considered for these posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old and not more than 30 years old as on 1 January 2026 (up to 40 years for Chhattisgarh domicile candidates), with further relaxations for reserved categories. The maximum age in any case cannot exceed 45 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for Staff Car Driver and Lift Man posts?
faq.answer: Both posts carry Pay Level 4 with a pay scale of Rs. 19,500 to Rs. 62,000 per month.
